articles.title: Palace was handed Andrew's controversial envoy emails six years ago
articles.description: Thousands of emails containing information about the former prince's financial dealings were given to the Royal Household in 2020.

articles.title: US, UK and Australia to develop underwater drone technology
articles.description: The technology, developed under the Aukus military pact, is aimed at protecting undersea cables and boosting naval defence.

articles.title: Liverpool sack head coach Arne Slot year after Premier League title win
articles.description: Liverpool sack head coach Arne Slot after two seasons in charge, with Andoni Iraola the leading contender to replace him.

articles.description: Wizz Air CEO Yvonne Moynihan also advises passengers to carry portable chargers and water due to lengthy queues.
